announcement.text: Your reviews, now supercharged with AI. Discover six new features driving more conversions.

hero.headline: Brilliant Reviews That Make You Stand Out
hero.subtitle: It's time to go beyond words.

stackingSection.headline: Visual reviews sell better
stackingSection.subtitle: Join 130,000+ brands building trust with the strongest form of social proof.

cards.title: Gather more photos and videos
cards.description: RayT streamlines every step of your review collection with perfectly timed requests and proven incentives, maximizing visual review submissions.

cards.title: Display reviews with flair
cards.description: From storefront to checkout, RayT widgets blend seamlessly with your brand and stand out where it matters. Make every review a natural part of your store.

cards.title: Supercharge your reviews with AI
cards.description: Automatically prioritize your best reviews, spotlight the most persuasive phrases, translate for global shoppers, and turn every review into more revenue.

cards.title: Amplify the love
cards.description: Maximize every happy customer interaction with our built-in conversion tools, including referrals, upsells, and smart discounts.

cards.title: Sell more, everywhere, all at once
cards.description: Showcase your glowing reviews on leading channels and take your social proof with you, everywhere you go.

success.headline: Obsessed with your success
success.subtitle: Helping merchants grow isn't just our mission — it's our origin story.

cards.title: Designed for merchants
cards.description: Easy setup, seamless integrations, real results. RayT is simple, powerful, and built to work the way you do.

cards.title: Built for results
cards.description: Every interaction, from automatic emails to beautiful widgets, is optimized to turn browsers into buyers.

cards.title: Here for you, always
cards.description: From world-class support to product education, our team is here around the clock to help you grow and learn.

caseStudies.headline: Discover how brands grow with RayT

items.title: Knit in a Box: Increasing conversions through happy customers

finalCta.headline: It's time to go beyond words.
